messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0151",
  "title": "照片视频",
  "page_index": 44,
  "page_range": "44"
}

Section text:
## 照片视频

InShot

Hypic

UpFoto

VivaCut

Filmora

XRecorder

BeautyCam

Wink

message.content: This section can answer questions regarding which photo and video applications are referenced in the document. It identifies the following entities: InShot, Hypic, UpFoto, VivaCut, Filmora, XRecorder, BeautyCam, and Wink. The section does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types, functioning solely as a categorical inventory of software names under the "照片视频" (Photos/Videos) topic.
